---
title: "Talks & Projects"
description: "Conference talks, meetups, and open-source projects."
---

## Open-source projects

### Rumi

Lead contributor to [Rumi](https://github.com/prayas-energy/rumi), an
open-source energy modelling platform developed by the
[Prayas Energy Group](https://prayaspune.org/peg/).

### xlwb

[xlwb](https://github.com/vikipedia/xlwb) This project aims at creating automation tool for updating predefined website from a excel sheet 

### Ragabot

[ragabot](https://github.com/vikipedia/ragabot) is simple tool which makes use of markov chains to learn from given notations of indian classical raaga and generates a tune in same raaga. 


## Talks

### [Ragabot — Music encoded](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LQNzvpKYax8)

PyCon India 2019. Simple Markov-based learning to create tunes in Indian
classical ragas.

### [Adventures in iterations](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WiOT4yEq058)

PyCon India 2018.

### [Can your UI change colors like a chameleon?](https://in.pycon.org/2009/smedia/slides/AVADIS_UI_pycon__.pdf)

PyCon India 2009. (Slides — PDF.)
